description: Lock the 2026-06-27 correction of traffic_signal_systems to early municipal electric road-intersection stop/move signals, not railway-only signaling, automobile mass production, streetcar network management, or later automated three-color systems.

checks.reason: The chronology stays anchored to Cleveland's 1914 early electric traffic-signal installation.
The scoped signal system uses electric lamps, circuits, controls, and current.
Road and street intersections are the physical substrate controlled by the signals.
Railway signaling is source-backed design lineage, not the direct road-intersection substrate.
Mass automobile production is demand context and should not be restored as the direct mechanism.
Urban mass transit networks are city-traffic context, not the direct physical substrate of the road signal.
